title: Camp types
description: Primary structural classification of a camp property (single-valued on camp.camp_type). Multi-use is expressed through camp-program-types, not here.

terms.label: Reservation
terms.description: A multi-camp property that contains several distinct camps.

terms.label: Resident Camp
terms.description: An overnight camp where units stay for multi-night sessions.

terms.label: High-Adventure Base
terms.description: A base offering advanced backcountry, aquatics, or expedition programs, usually for older participants.

terms.label: Short-Term Camp
terms.description: A property used mainly for weekend or primitive troop camping.

terms.label: Day Camp
terms.description: A camp attended during the day, without overnight stays.

terms.label: Program Center
terms.description: A facility for training, meetings, or program activities rather than resident camping.

terms.label: Other
terms.description: A camp property that does not fit the other categories.
